title: tinus zeylanica
intro: Tinus zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon ironwood or Ceylonese ironwood, is a tree species native to Sri Lanka. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal compounds. The health benefits of Tinus zeylanica include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and immune function.
